快3的大小单双概率学【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-235289208_58691908<br>vk.com/topic-237847581_59825364<br>vk.com/topic-238137069_58966396<br>vk.com/topic-235289208_58691932<br>vk.com/topic-237847581_59825391<br>vk.com/topic-235289208_58691957<br>vk.com/topic-237847581_59825411<br>vk.com/topic-231600840_59299676<br>vk.com/topic-235289208_58691980<br>vk.com/topic-231600840_59299696<br>vk.com/topic-237847581_59825435<br>vk.com/topic-235289208_58692001<br>vk.com/topic-231600840_59299722<br>vk.com/topic-231204291_59825477<br>vk.com/topic-231600840_59299749<br>vk.com/topic-231169578_58692033<br>vk.com/topic-231204291_59825491<br>vk.com/topic-231600840_59299779<br>vk.com/topic-231169578_58692055<br>vk.com/topic-231204291_59825506<br>vk.com/topic-231169578_58692076<br>vk.com/topic-231204291_59825523<br>vk.com/topic-238137069_58966559<br>vk.com/topic-231169578_58692098<br>vk.com/topic-231204291_59825543<br>vk.com/topic-231169578_58692124<br>vk.com/topic-238137148_58692142<br>vk.com/topic-238137148_58692170<br>vk.com/topic-238137148_58692188<br>vk.com/topic-231211503_58466797<br>vk.com/topic-231169578_58692202<br>vk.com/topic-238137148_58692204<br>vk.com/topic-231211503_58466836<br>vk.com/to
